title: ApprovalChain
description: Reusable approval-chain definition consumed by Deployment and Incident entities. Each link records who approved, when, and the reason. Timestamps are client-provided ISO 8601 strings; cryptographic non-repudiation (e.g. cosign bundles) is layered separately.

approver.description: Identifier of the approver. Prefer stable handles (email, team slug, LDAP id) over display names.

approved_at.description: ISO 8601 date-time the approval was recorded.

reason.description: Free-form justification. Shown in audit output.

role.description: Approver role at the time of approval (e.g. tech-lead, cto, finops-director).

approvalChain.description: Ordered list of approvals. First entry is the earliest approver. Under --strict-enterprise this list must be non-empty when approval_state=approved.
